summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Child Privacy Rules for The Drop news app. All 5 privacy rules verified working correctly. 19/19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Profile page social features fully functional with all social tabs working.
passed_tests: Privacy Rule 1: Child accounts NOT in /api/friends/search results
Privacy Rule 2: Direct friend request to child returns 403
Privacy Rule 3: Child CAN connect via invite link
Privacy Rule 4: Child connect via invite triggers parent notification (mock)
Privacy Rule 5: Child inviter triggers parent notification (mock)
Regression: /api/friends returns friends list with correct structure
Regression: /api/friends/leaderboard returns leaderboard with is_self flag
Regression: search_returns_normal_accounts works for non-child accounts
Frontend: Profile page loads with data-testid='profile-page'
Frontend: Friends tab shows friend list with Zara and Privacy Test Kid
Frontend: Leaderboard tab shows Hansel at #1 with rankings
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test child accounts during tests (TEST_Child_*, TEST_ChildInviter_*, etc.) - these use unique UUIDs so won't conflict with future tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Child privacy rules fully implemented and tested: (1) Child accounts with account_type='child' are excluded from /api/friends/search results via MongoDB query filter. (2) Direct friend requests to child accounts via /api/friends/request return 403 with message 'This user can only be added via invite link'. (3) Child accounts CAN connect via /api/invite/connect/{username} - the invite link bypasses the friend request restriction. (4) When child connects via invite, mock_send_parent_email_friend_request() is called (MOCKED via logger.info). (5) When inviter is a child, parent notification also triggered. Registration endpoints: /api/auth/register-child creates child accounts, /api/auth/register-self creates self accounts. Profile page has social section with Friends/Board/Requests tabs, add friend search modal, invite link copy button. Key data-testids: social-tab-friends, social-tab-leaderboard, social-tab-requests, add-friend-btn, friend-search-input, invite-link-btn, knowledge-score-card, streak-card, profile-page.

features_verified.privacy_rule_2_direct_request_403: ✅ Direct friend request to child returns 403
features_verified.privacy_rule_3_invite_link_works: ✅ Child can connect via invite link
features_verified.privacy_rule_5_child_inviter_notificatio: ✅ Parent notified when child is inviter (MOCKED)

mocked_apis.note: Parent email notifications are MOCKED via logger.info - no real email service integrated. The mock functions log to console but do not send actual emails.

privacy_rules_implementation_details.rule_1_code_location: server.py line 1472 - MongoDB query excludes account_type='child'
privacy_rules_implementation_details.rule_4_code_location: server.py lines 1578-1582 - Checks if user is child and calls mock notification
privacy_rules_implementation_details.rule_5_code_location: server.py lines 1584-1586 - Checks if inviter is child and calls mock notification
